# Sandeep Lamture — Full Stack Developer

> Portfolio of Sandeep Lamture, a React and full-stack developer with 4+ years of experience building high-performance web applications.

Sandeep Lamture is a React Developer and Frontend Engineer specializing in React, TypeScript, Node.js, and modern web technologies. This site showcases his projects, experience, and technical writing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, about, experience at TCS, featured projects, and contact info.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles and tutorials on React, TypeScript, and modern web development.

## Optional

- [Resume (PDF)](/resume.pdf): Downloadable résumé.
